title: Minimalist Coffee Grinder Hero Image
description: A premium product-ad hero shot of a minimalist coffee grinder resting on a brushed-steel kitchen counter. Soft, diffused morning light streams in from a nearby window, casting gentle highlights across the matte-black grinder body and polished chrome accents. Shallow depth of field and generous negative space give the composition a clean, editorial feel suited for high-end advertising.
prompt: Minimalist coffee grinder on a brushed-steel kitchen counter, soft diffused morning light from a nearby window, shallow depth of field, matte black grinder body with polished chrome accents, clean negative space, premium product advertisement aesthetic, editorial photography style
